summary: POS page redesign testing completed. All features verified: Layout wrapper with sidebar present, NT Commerce branding visible in title, session warning displayed when no session open, POS task menu items working, product shortcuts grid visible, customer selection dropdown functional, cart table displays correctly, sale validation button properly disabled when no session/empty cart.
critical_code_review_comments: POS page correctly uses Layout wrapper - main sidebar (aside) now visible
NT Commerce branding correctly shows in title: 'Point de Vente - NT Commerce' (FR) / 'نقطة البيع - NT Commerce' (AR)
Session warning displayed correctly when no daily session is open

All 10 POS task menu items present: Liste des articles, Articles par famille, Liste des clients, Clients par famille, Inserer note libre, Mode de retour, Depot-Caisse, Retrait-Caisse, Rapports, Historiques
Product shortcuts grid (20 boxes) visible on right side with proper styling
Customer dropdown with data-testid='customer-select' working correctly
Add customer button with data-testid='add-customer-btn' present
Cart table displays with proper columns: Code, Article Name, Qty, Price, Discount %, Amount
Valider button (data-testid='vente-btn') correctly disabled when no session or empty cart
Annuler button (data-testid='annuler-btn') present for clearing cart
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS page redesign verified: 1) Main Layout wrapper with collapsible sidebar is now applied to POS page, 2) Title shows 'NT Commerce' not 'Lynx', 3) Session warning displays when no daily session is open with link to open session, 4) All 10 POS task menu items in left sidebar visible and clickable, 5) Product shortcuts grid (20 boxes) on right side working, 6) Customer dropdown, warehouse dropdown, price type selector all present, 7) Cart table with empty state message displayed, 8) Valider/Annuler buttons with correct disabled states. The POS page now follows the same design pattern as DashboardPage with standard Layout component.

layout_wrapper.details: Main Layout component wrapping POS page, sidebar (aside element) visible

nt_commerce_branding.details: Title shows 'Point de Vente - NT Commerce' (FR) / 'نقطة البيع - NT Commerce' (AR)

session_warning.details: Warning card with amber styling shows when no session open, with 'Ouvrir session' link

items_verified: Inserer une note libre / إدراج ملاحظة

product_shortcuts_grid.details: 20 shortcut boxes visible in right sidebar with 'Raccourcis' / 'اختصارات المنتجات' header

customer_selection.details: Customer dropdown (data-testid='customer-select') present and opens on click

cart_table.details: Cart table with proper headers displayed, empty state message shown when cart empty

sale_validation.details: Valider button (data-testid='vente-btn') correctly disabled when no session or empty cart
